_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Skill in analyzing essential network data (e.g., router configuration files, routing protocols).
reference_document_element_description: Skill in writing technical documentation for data systems, including architecture diagrams, API specifications, operational runbooks, data dictionaries, and troubleshooting guides that enable team independence.
comments: DCWF ksa superset of WIDAI TF domain. TF-S-011 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: TF-K-013 (TF, cosine: 0.563), DQ-S-006 (DQ, cosine: 0.531).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 4.0/10 (raw 0.396). Shared vocabulary: [data, skill]. DCWF-only terms [analyzing, configuration, essential, files, network, protocols] vs WIDAI-only terms [api, architecture, diagrams, dictionaries, documentation, enable] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.877 (P=0.881, R=0.873). Balanced P/R — the 12-word DCWF element and 24-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: contradiction-dominant (99.8%). Despite 'Superset of' classification, the model detects semantic tension between "Skill in analyzing essential network data (e.g., router configuration files, rou" and "Skill in writing technical documentation for data systems, including architectur". Indicates these concepts operate in adjacent but distinct professional domains — shared vocabulary, different application context.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.577 > STS 0.396 (gap +0.181). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [data, skill] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 9.1%. Shared tokens: [data, skill]. DCWF-only: [analyzing, configuration, essential, files, network, protocols]. WIDAI-only: [api, architecture, diagrams, dictionaries, documentation, enable].
